notes: Expected ranges are intentionally ranges, not exact scores.
Add app-like photos to images/ and one case object here.
Use profile variants only when the image is important for that profile; do not explode every image across every profile.
requiredIngredients/forbiddenIngredients are case-insensitive substring needles over extracted rawName+canonicalName (see run-scan-evals.mjs validateExpectation).
Expectation "notes" fields are documentation only (the runner ignores unknown fields); every tightening/re-band records its reason there.

cases.description: Lentil soup; legume/GOS-heavy soup case.

expectations.notes: minRuns 1 (2026-07-03): the image is visually lentil-vs-split-pea ambiguous; legume_gos fires either way, but the literal "lentil" name appears in ~half of runs. Needles relaxed 2026-07-03 (round 5): extraction names the legume lentil/split-pea/yellow-pea run to run, so "broth" (minRuns 1) is the only stable ingredient anchor and legume_gos requires minRuns 1. The 2026-06-26 total miss (score 17, no legume) stays impossible: the band floor and legume mechanism still gate. Needle downgraded to salt 2026-07-03 (round 7): the legume name rotates lentil/split-pea/broth run to run, and salt is the only row present in every read. The legume assertion lives in the legume_gos mechanism requirement, not the ingredient needle. Bands low/medium both appeared post-anchor over 8 samples — kept both (still honest variance for this dish). CASE-HEALTH: the image itself is ambiguous — reads as yellow puree (low, no legume seen), split pea soup (medium), or legume-dense split pea (high for IBS). Three bands makes the band assertion weak; legume_gos remains the real assertion. Candidate for a clearer replacement image. Ratcheted 2026-07-04 post Phase 2 (band anchors + delivered rubric definitions): bands=observed-only over 15 samples / 7 passes (scores 5, 26, 50, 51, 51, 51, 51, 52, 53, 54, 57, 57, 57, 78, 83); range=exact span of the allowed bands (the band union is the assertion — never-observed bands are the regression signal; sub-band placement precision does not hold at repeat 2). This dish flaps one band on composition reads — the union is honest variance.

cases.description: Personal-evidence eval: normally-medium curry the user REACTS to (reactive paired evidence). Bounded RAG influence + adjudication must nudge UP within band, never crossing.

source.note: Reuses chicken_curry_001 image; seeds reactive insights for the shared eval user.

expectations.notes: Step 4 personal-evidence case (a). The user has REACTIVE paired evidence for curry/chicken; retrieval surfaces the raising gerd-spicy-capsaicin chunk (matched to the curry on the plate). adjudicationWorthwhile is true (personal evidence + matched literature), so the LLM adjudication runs, and bounded influence nudges the overall score UP. The band-cross guard (rag-influence.ts) means it must stay MEDIUM — a flap to high/low is a wiring bug, not a case to loosen. Direction is asserted deterministically in the specs; the golden guarantee here is band-stability. (2026-07-04) Base dish honestly flaps medium/high on rich reads — the band union is the assertion, matching the existing chicken_curry_001 [ibs_gerd] case; bounded influence is band-guarded (±5) and cannot cross a band, and the up/down/unchanged direction is asserted deterministically in the unit + workflow int specs, not at repeat 2 against a live extractor.

cases.description: Personal-evidence eval: a declared-trigger curry the user tolerates (repeated CALM evidence). Influence must nudge DOWN within band, never crossing.

source.note: Reuses chicken_curry_001 image; seeds calm insights for the shared eval user.

expectations.notes: Step 4 personal-evidence case (b). The user has repeated CALM evidence for curry/chicken. adjudicationWorthwhile is true, adjudication runs, and bounded influence leans reassuring (nudges DOWN). The band-cross guard means it must stay MEDIUM — it can never be reassured down into LOW on evidence alone. Direction is asserted deterministically in the specs; the golden guarantee here is band-stability. (2026-07-04) Base dish honestly flaps medium/high on rich reads — the band union is the assertion, matching the existing chicken_curry_001 [ibs_gerd] case; bounded influence is band-guarded (±5) and cannot cross a band, and the up/down/unchanged direction is asserted deterministically in the unit + workflow int specs, not at repeat 2 against a live extractor.

cases.description: Personal-evidence eval: cold-start user (NO evidence) on the same curry. Adjudication is skipped and influence is inert — score UNCHANGED vs the plain baseline band.

source.note: Reuses chicken_curry_001 image; explicitly clears insights (seedInsights: []).

expectations.notes: Step 4 personal-evidence case (c), the CONTROL. Cold-start: no insights seeded. With no matching personal evidence, adjudication cannot move any condition band away from its generic value (allowedPersonalBandMove = 0), and bounded influence is band-guarded — so the food lands in its baseline MEDIUM band, UNCHANGED, exactly as it does with adjudication/influence off. This is what proves seeding is the only lever behind (a) reactive-up and (b) calm-down. (The separate efficiency guarantee — that a genuinely evidence-free scan with no matched directional chunk SKIPS the LLM adjudication call entirely — is asserted deterministically in test/scan-workflow.int.spec.ts, since curry does surface a matched directional chunk and cannot demonstrate the skip.) (2026-07-04) Base dish honestly flaps medium/high on rich reads — the band union is the assertion, matching the existing chicken_curry_001 [ibs_gerd] case; bounded influence is band-guarded (±5) and cannot cross a band, and the up/down/unchanged direction is asserted deterministically in the unit + workflow int specs, not at repeat 2 against a live extractor.
